things.name: Piazza Maggiore
things.description: Bologna's magnificent main square flanked by the Basilica di San Petronio and Palazzo d'Accursio

things.name: Two Towers (Le Due Torri)
things.description: Medieval twin towers Asinelli and Garisenda — climb the 498-step Asinelli for breathtaking views

things.name: Porticoes of Bologna
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 40 km of medieval arcaded walkways that define the city's character

things.name: National Art Gallery (Pinacoteca Nazionale)
things.description: Outstanding collection of Bolognese and Italian paintings from the 14th to 18th centuries

things.name: Sanctuary of San Luca
things.description: Hilltop baroque basilica connected to the city by the world's longest portico (3.8 km, 666 arches)

things.name: Bologna Food Market Tour
things.description: Mercato delle Erbe and Quadrilatero quarter — the food capital of Italy with tagliatelle, tortellini and mortadella

things.name: Archiginnasio Anatomical Theatre
things.description: Spectacular 17th-century wooden anatomy theatre in the oldest European university's original building

things.name: Santo Stefano Complex
things.description: Fascinating interlinked complex of seven medieval churches spanning 1,500 years of history

things.name: MAST Museum
things.description: Stunning contemporary industrial arts and photography foundation with free entry

things.name: Ferrari Museum, Modena Day Trip
things.description: Drive 40 minutes to Modena for the Ferrari Museum and the Enzo Ferrari birthplace museum
